title: GEPCRAFT
description: The first-ever GEPCRAFT modpack! Featuring the popular 'Cobblemon' mod, alongside a slew of Vanilla+ mods.
body:
# GEPCRAFT is a laid-back community-oriented Minecraft server spearheading Cobblemon!

We've got a bunch of QoL mods that'll improve Vanilla Minecraft's original gameplay and overall experience, you can look at the list of these by the modlist. 

This modpack also comes with shaders and resource packs. If you'd like to play Vanilla style: you can just remove them through the game yourself.

If there's any issues with compatibility from your end and are part of the game server; make sure to join our Discord server, reach out to the **STAFF**, and let us know so that we can provide support.

_- The GEPCRAFT Team_
